_comment: v1 pixel -> v3w pixel maps (both full-res). From simultaneous moon sightings; see bin/fit-v1-v3w. TWO models: affine (tight on the moon arc, tilts at corners) and fov_box (published-FOV scale + fitted rotation — for the v1 FOV box and the sun trail inside it). moon-overlay --v1-fov / --v1-sun use fov_box. NOTE: empirical scale (~0.745) disagrees with published FOV (0.9325) — v1 may be wider than spec; kept FOV scale, worth a plate-scale check.

fov_box._comment: q = scale * R @ p + translate. scale from published horizontal FOV (v1 53.5deg, v3w 102deg); R fitted (rotation only) from the matched moon points.
